The '''DXR-6 disruptor rifle''' was a [[Disruptor rifle/Legends|disruptor rifle]] built and mass-produced by the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Criminal Syndicate]].

==Description==
[[File:Death_Mark_TCG-SM.png|thumb|left|200px|A Trandoshan firing a DXR-6]]
The DXR-6 was a larger version of the [[DX-2 disruptor pistol/Legends|DX-2 disruptor pistol]]. As was the case with all [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptor]] weapons, it was outlawed by all civilized worlds. It could disintegrate matter at the molecular level and rip apart living material with ease and speed. Even a glancing blow could produce grievous injuries. This weapon usually resulted in a one-hit kill and often the only sign that there was a target was a smoking pile of ash where the enemy used to be.

The DXR-6 had a limited ammunition capacity of 5 or 10 shots. It could be fitted with a zoom [[Scope/Legends|scope]], making it an effective sniper rifle at great distances. Because of the massive energy involved in creating a disruptor beam, the DXR-6 needed a cooldown time of more than 5 seconds before it could fire again.

A variant of the DXR-6 disruptor rifle produced during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was the [[DXR-6b disruptor rifle]].<ref name="SWG:DDR">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|DXR-6b Disruptor Rifle}}</ref>

==History==
As with the [[DX-2 disruptor pistol/Legends|DX-2 disruptor pistol]], the [[Tenloss Syndicate]] sold many of the DXR-6 disruptor rifles to the notorious [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization. A few [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Imperial Inquisitors]] were also known to brandish this weapon to add to their intimidation tactics.<ref name="Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook" />

[[Oppressor-7 class dark trooper]]s, also employed this rifle.

[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]], [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], and [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]] were known to purchase the weapon off the [[Black market/Legends|black market]].

The DXR-6 was used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]]. Despite its illegality, the [[Jedi Praxeum]] was known to allow [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]] to carry this weapon on field missions during the [[New Republic era]].

==Behind the scenes==
There are major differences in this weapon's range presented in ''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' ''[[Saga Edition]]'' role-playing game supplement that differ from the range as listed in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''. Instead of an optimum and maximum range of 10 and 20 meters respectively, ''The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide'' treats the DXR-6 disruptor rifle as a standard rifle, giving it an optimum and maximum range 45 and 450 meters respectively. This is probably due to the fact that the role-playing game data is heavily simplified and modified for ease of play.
